use_cases: Rich link previews that show additional content on hover for article or product cards
Image previews when hovering over links in content-heavy applications
Contextual information popups for educational or reference materials
Profile or user preview cards in social or collaboration platforms
Quick-look product details in e-commerce listings without page navigation
ai_summary: A preview card component from Base UI that displays rich content popups when hovering over or focusing on links. Uses a compound component pattern with Root, Trigger, Portal, Positioner, Popup, and Arrow sub-components. Features smooth scale and opacity transitions for enter/exit animations with proper accessibility support including focus-visible states and keyboard navigation.
